name: Nike Air Max 270
description: Iconic silhouette featuring the largest Nike Air unit ever created in a lifestyle shoe. Delivers all-day comfort with bold, expressive style.

name: Adidas Ultraboost 23
description: Engineered for epic energy return. Primeknit+ upper wraps your foot in adaptive comfort while the Boost midsole propels every stride.

name: Converse Chuck Taylor All Star
description: A cultural icon for over a century. The timeless canvas high-top worn by athletes, musicians and rebels from every generation.

name: Vans Old Skool Skate
description: The original side-stripe skate shoe. Durable suede and canvas upper with legendary Vans waffle outsole for superior boardfeel.

name: New Balance 574 Classic
description: The definitive heritage runner. ENCAP midsole technology provides lasting support and stability without sacrificing retro aesthetics.

name: Puma RS-X³ Puzzle
description: Retro-futuristic chunkiness meets modern cushioning tech. The RS-X³ remixes vintage running DNA with bold colorways.

name: Apple MacBook Air M3
description: Supercharged by M3. Impossibly thin, fanless design with a Liquid Retina display and all-day battery life.

name: Sony WH-1000XM5 Headphones
description: Industry-leading noise cancellation with 8 microphones, 30h battery and multipoint connection for power users.

name: Apple Watch Series 9
description: Double tap. The most powerfully intelligent Apple Watch delivers advanced health insights and crash detection.

name: Samsung Galaxy S24 Ultra
description: Built-in S Pen meets titanium. 200MP camera and Galaxy AI bring smartphone photography to unprecedented heights.

name: Sony Alpha A7 IV Camera
description: Full-frame mirrorless precision. 33MP CMOS sensor, 4K 60p video and advanced subject recognition for professionals.

name: iPad Pro 12.9" M2
description: The ultimate iPad experience. M2 chip powers ProMotion display and Apple Pencil hover detection at desktop-class performance.

name: Oxford Button-Down Shirt
description: Tailored from premium 100% cotton Oxford cloth. Sharp enough for the boardroom yet relaxed for weekends.

name: Slim Fit Stretch Denim Jeans
description: Modern slim-fit silhouette in four-way stretch denim. Moves with you from commute to cocktails without compromise.

name: Oversized Fleece Hoodie
description: Ultra-heavyweight 450gsm fleece cotton in a roomy relaxed silhouette. The ultimate comfort uniform elevated.

name: Merino Crew Neck Sweater
description: Fine-knit from 100% grade-A merino wool. Naturally temperature-regulating and itch-free lightweight layer.

name: Genuine Leather Biker Jacket
description: Full-grain lambskin constructed into a heritage moto silhouette. Asymmetric zip and supple hand feel that improves with time.

name: Floral Chiffon Midi Dress
description: Fluid chiffon in a bold botanical print with flattering V-neck and airy midi length perfect for any occasion.

name: Ray-Ban Aviator Classic
description: Beloved by icons since 1937. Crystal glass lenses filter UV perfectly inside a lightweight metal frame.

name: Waxed Canvas Backpack 30L
description: Built to outlast trends. Water-resistant waxed canvas with leather straps and padded laptop sleeve.

name: Slim RFID Leather Wallet
description: Full-grain leather bifold with RFID-blocking inner lining, 6 card slots and cash pocket.

name: Noir Oud Luxury Perfume
description: Opulent oriental woody fragrance. Rare oud wood meets bergamot and dark amber for a deep impression.

name: Triple-Insulated Water Bottle 1L
description: Vacuum-sealed 18/8 stainless steel keeps drinks ice-cold for 48h and hot for 24h. No sweat guarantee.

name: Gold Minimalist Watch
description: Swiss quartz movement in brushed stainless steel case with sapphire-coated glass. Luxury that whispers.

name: Vitamin C Brightening Serum 30ml
description: 20% stabilised ascorbic acid combined with hyaluronic acid. Visibly brightens and firms skin texture.

name: Dyson Airwrap Multi-Styler
description: Curl, wave, smooth and dry simultaneously using Coanda airflow — no extreme heat damage finish.

name: Yoga Mat Pro 6mm
description: Natural rubber base with closed-cell surface repels bacteria. Laser-printed alignment lines included.

name: Retinol Night Cream 50ml
description: Clinical-strength 0.3% encapsulated retinol with niacinamide and peptides. Improves texture while you sleep.

name: Premium Protein Shaker 700ml
description: Leakproof BlenderBall whisk gives you lump-free shakes in seconds. BPA-free Tritan construction.

name: Jade Facial Roller & Gua Sha Set
description: Authentic cold jade stone roller and gua sha tool. Reduces puffiness and boosts skin circulation.
